name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG
description:
This is an accurate jjk rpg but obviously doesn't follow the original plot, storyline will be based off of whatever scenario or story you want to make up. Lots of characters, except for some like mahoraga and hakari. Give me reviews so I can improve the bot. 

If you liked this bot, check out my new main account called "GrassToucher99" *(do NOT call me out on this corny username)* I have a JJK bot out with 25+ characters looking for improvement, thank uu!
creator: Sghshsshhshhs
